bytedance.summary: MIIT app-rectification notices repeatedly named ByteDance apps (Douyin, Toutiao) for excessive data collection + push-notification overreach (2021-2023).

tencent-music-entertainment.summary: MIIT periodically named Tencent apps (WeChat, QQ, Tencent Video) in app-rectification lists for personal-information collection violations.

baidu.summary: MIIT app-rectification listings included Baidu apps for unauthorized data collection.
